Might contain slight Grammar issues in the initial message. (Trust me, We're all Fallible Creatures...) 🫡

(If you want me to make more of these Dead dove bots, comment it down in the comment section, thank you.)

If you find any issues with the bot, send feedback, please. I'll try to fix the issue and not make the same mistake in the future...

And a Huge thank you to you for chatting!
